messages.content: 中译英：我作为项目负责人牵头多项ESG相关的投资基金，平均实缴规模达35亿元。我还曾负责多项ESG基金的退出工作，平均投资人收益率约15%；我曾参与两家美国清洁技术公司的融资，预估收益20倍以上；另外，我还曾参与绿色能源专项基金的设立，推动“互联网+充电设施”融合。

As the project leader, I have led several ESG-related investment funds with an average committed capital of 3.5 billion yuan. I have also been responsible for the exit of multiple ESG funds, delivering an average investor return of approximately 15%. Additionally, I have participated in the financing of two American clean technology companies, with estimated returns of over 20 times. Furthermore, I have been involved in the establishment of a dedicated fund for green energy and have promoted the integration of "Internet + charging facilities" in the field.

润色如下内容：As the project leader, I have led several ESG-related investment funds with an average committed capital of 3.5 billion yuan. I have also been responsible for the exit of multiple ESG funds, delivering an average investor return of approximately 15%. Additionally, I have participated in the financing of two American clean technology companies, with estimated returns of over 20 times. Furthermore, I have been involved in the establishment of a dedicated fund for green energy and have promoted the integration of “Internet + charging facilities” in the field.

As the project leader, I have spearheaded numerous investment funds related to ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) with an average committed capital of 3.5 billion yuan. I have successfully managed the exit of several ESG funds, yielding an average investor return of approximately 15%. Furthermore, I have actively participated in the financing of two American clean technology companies, resulting in estimated returns of over 20 times. Additionally, I have played a crucial role in establishing a dedicated fund for green energy and have been instrumental in promoting the convergence of "Internet + charging facilities" in the industry.
中译英：我在推动清洁能源投资和可持续发展方面拥有卓越的领导能力和战略眼光，热衷于发展具有环保意识的投资项目。我在ESG领域的专业能力和丰富经验将为香港投资市场引入更多的清洁能源和环保项目，促进可持续发展和创造新的机遇。

I possess exceptional leadership skills and strategic vision in driving clean energy investments and sustainable development. I am passionate about developing investment projects with environmental consciousness. My professional expertise and extensive experience in the ESG field will contribute to introducing more clean energy and environmental projects into the investment market in Hong Kong, promoting sustainable development, and creating new opportunities.

润色如下内容：I possess exceptional leadership skills and strategic vision in driving clean energy investments and sustainable development. I am passionate about developing investment projects with environmental consciousness. My professional expertise and extensive experience in the ESG field will contribute to introducing more clean energy and environmental projects into the investment market in Hong Kong, promoting sustainable development, and creating new opportunities.

I have outstanding leadership skills and a strategic vision when it comes to promoting clean energy investments and sustainable development. I am deeply passionate about developing investment projects that prioritize environmental consciousness. Leveraging my professional expertise and extensive experience in the ESG field, I am committed to bringing more clean energy and environmental projects into the investment market in Hong Kong. By doing so, I aim to drive sustainable development and create new opportunities for the market.
中译英：在哈尔滨工程大学就读本科期间，我的绩点排名前5%，并荣获校级学习优秀奖。在杜伦大学完成新能源与可再生能源本硕连读学位期间，我也并取得了优秀成绩并荣获一等奖学金，还被评为学院优秀研究生。此外，在学习过程中，我还积极参与科研项目并发表了相关论文。

During my undergraduate studies at Harbin Engineering University, I ranked in the top 5% of my class with an excellent academic performance, which earned me the recognition of the university's Excellent Study Award. Upon completing my integrated Bachelor's and Master's degree in New Energy and Renewable Energy at Durham University, I consistently achieved outstanding grades and was awarded a First-Class Scholarship. Additionally, I was recognized as an outstanding graduate student by the faculty. Throughout my academic journey, I actively participated in research projects and published relevant papers in the field.

润色如下内容：During my undergraduate studies at Harbin Engineering University, I ranked in the top 5% of my class with an excellent academic performance, which earned me the recognition of the university’s Excellent Study Award. Upon completing my integrated Bachelor’s and Master’s degree in New Energy and Renewable Energy at Durham University, I consistently achieved outstanding grades and was awarded a First-Class Scholarship. Additionally, I was recognized as an outstanding graduate student by the faculty. Throughout my academic journey, I actively participated in research projects and published relevant papers in the field.

During my undergraduate studies at Harbin Engineering University, I consistently ranked in the top 5% of my class and received the prestigious Excellent Study Award from the university. Continuing my academic journey, I pursued an integrated Bachelor's and Master's degree in New Energy and Renewable Energy at Durham University. Throughout my time there, I maintained an exceptional academic record and was honored with a First-Class Scholarship. Moreover, I was recognized by the faculty as an outstanding graduate student. Alongside my studies, I actively engaged in research projects and had the privilege of publishing relevant papers in the field.
中译英：我计划参与香港的ESG倡议和行业论坛，与相关公司合作，比如德勤（Deloitte）、普华永道（PwC）、安永（EY）和麦肯锡（McKinsey）等，开展ESG评估和咨询服务。同时，我希望通过合作开发创新的ESG产品和解决方案，推动本地商业机构在可持续发展方面的发展。

I plan to actively participate in ESG initiatives and industry forums in Hong Kong, collaborating with relevant companies such as Deloitte, PwC, EY, and McKinsey to provide ESG assessment and consulting services. Additionally, I aim to foster the development of innovative ESG products and solutions through partnerships, thereby driving the growth of local businesses in sustainable development.

润色如下内容：I plan to actively participate in ESG initiatives and industry forums in Hong Kong, collaborating with relevant companies such as Deloitte, PwC, EY, and McKinsey to provide ESG assessment and consulting services. Additionally, I aim to foster the development of innovative ESG products and solutions through partnerships, thereby driving the growth of local businesses in sustainable development.

I am determined to actively engage in ESG initiatives and industry forums in Hong Kong, where I will collaborate with esteemed companies like Deloitte, PwC, EY, and McKinsey to offer ESG assessment and consulting services. Through these partnerships, I seek to foster the development of innovative ESG products and solutions, propelling the growth of local businesses in sustainable development. Together, we can create a more sustainable future for Hong Kong and beyond.

中译英：CFA：由美国投资管理与研究协会（AIMR）颁发的特许金融分析师职业资格认证。
可持续投资奖：在筛选、评估和管理可持续投资的过程中取得优异成绩的团队。
ESG创新奖：在ESG领域提供创新解决方案、开发新工具或方法的个人或团队。

CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst): A professional qualification certification awarded by the Association for Investment Management and Research (AIMR) in the United States.

Sustainable Investment Award: An award granted to teams that have achieved outstanding performance in the selection, assessment, and management of sustainable investments.

ESG Innovation Award: An award presented to individuals or teams who have provided innovative solutions, developed new tools, or introduced new methods in the field of ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance).
中译英：事业之外，我将着重考虑家属安置和子女教育。我会购置一个提供良好的教育资源和日常生活设施的单位，为子女选择适合的学校，并积极参与他们的学习进程。此外，我也会积极融入当地社区，学习粤语，参与社区活动，与邻居建立友好关系。

Outside of my career, I will prioritize the well-being of my family, including settling them in a comfortable environment and ensuring quality education for my children. I will consider purchasing a property that provides access to excellent educational resources and daily amenities. I will also carefully select suitable schools for my children and actively participate in their learning journey. Additionally, I will strive to integrate into the local community by learning Cantonese, engaging in community activities, and building friendly relationships with neighbors.

润色如下内容：Outside of my career, I will prioritize the well-being of my family, including settling them in a comfortable environment and ensuring quality education for my children. I will consider purchasing a property that provides access to excellent educational resources and daily amenities. I will also carefully select suitable schools for my children and actively participate in their learning journey. Additionally, I will strive to integrate into the local community by learning Cantonese, engaging in community activities, and building friendly relationships with neighbors.

Apart from my professional endeavors, I give utmost importance to the welfare of my family. This involves ensuring a comfortable living environment and providing quality education for my children. I will meticulously choose a residence that offers access to excellent educational resources and convenient amenities. Moreover, I will actively engage in my children's education by selecting appropriate schools and actively supporting and participating in their learning journey. Additionally, I am committed to integrating into the local community by learning and mastering Cantonese, actively participating in community activities, and fostering friendly relationships with my neighbors.
